SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class EventDetailsTest

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
public class EventDetailsTest extends Object
Instrumented UI tests for EventDetailsActivity.

User Stories Tested: US 01.05.02 As an entrant I want to accept an invitation to register. US 01.05.03 As an entrant I want to decline an invitation. US 01.05.04 As an entrant I want to know how many users are on the waiting list. US 01.05.05 As an entrant, I want to be informed about the criteria or guidelines for the lottery selection process. US 01.06.02 As an entrant I want to be able to sign up for an event from the event details.

Tests use temporary Firestore collections to avoid interfering with production data.

Author:
Kito Lee Son

  • Constructor Details

    • EventDetailsTest

      public EventDetailsTest()

  • Method Details

    • setupTestData

      public void setupTestData() throws InterruptedException
      Prepares test data in Firestore before each test runs.

      Creates a test organizer, test entrant, and two events. The entrant is added to both events with status "selected". One additional user is placed on the waiting list to simulate a waiting list size of 1.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the Firestore insertion wait is interrupted

    • testWaitingListDisplayed

      public void testWaitingListDisplayed()
      Tests that an entrant can see the number of people on the waiting list for an event.

      The test enters an event details page, and verifies that the correct waitlist number is displayed.

      User Story Tested: US 01.05.04 As an entrant I want to know how many users are on the waiting list.

    • testAcceptInvitation

      public void testAcceptInvitation() throws InterruptedException
      Tests that an entrant can accept the invitation to an event.

      The test enters an event details page, clicks the register button, and verifies that the status is updated to "registered" in the entrants subdirectory in the Firestore events database.

      User Story Tested: US 01.05.02 As an entrant I want to accept an invitation to register.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testDeclineInvitation

      public void testDeclineInvitation() throws InterruptedException
      Tests that an entrant can reject the invitation to an event.

      The test enters an event details page, clicks the decline button, and verifies that the status is updated to "rejected" in the entrants subdirectory in the Firestore events database.

      User Story Tested: US 01.05.03 As an entrant I want to decline an invitation.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testLotteryGuidelinesDisplayed

      public void testLotteryGuidelinesDisplayed() throws InterruptedException
      Tests that an entrant can view the lottery guidelines from the event details page.

      The test simulates a user opening the event details, tapping the "Lottery Guidelines" button, and verifies that the guidelines message is displayed as expected.

      User Story Tested: US 01.05.05 As an entrant, I want to be informed about the criteria or guidelines for the lottery selection process.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the wait is interrupted

    • testEntrantSignUpForEvent

      public void testEntrantSignUpForEvent() throws InterruptedException
      Tests that an entrant can sign up for a new event from the event details page.

      The test launches the EventDetailsActivity for an event that the entrant is not registered for, clicks the "Join Waitlist" button, and verifies that Firestore updates the entrant's status to "waiting".

      User Story Tested: US 01.06.02 As an entrant I want to be able to sign up for an event from the event details.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • cleanup

      public void cleanup() throws InterruptedException
      Removes all test data from Firestore after each test.

      This method deletes documents from events_test and users_test collections to ensure tests do not affect each other or pollute the production database.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the cleanup wait operation is interrupted
